reason: Verified that the agent "QA-20260430-004442-o7b4" responds to a math question with the correct answer "4"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Application loaded successfully with Super Agent page displaying sidebar with multiple agents
Found and clicked the "QA-20260430-004442-o7b4" agent in the sidebar — Agent detail page loaded, showing agent configuration options and message input field
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status indicator displayed "idle" in the top right corner
Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message was typed into the message input field and send button clicked successfully; message appeared in chat history
Waited up to 3 minutes for a response — Response arrived within 1 second; agent status changed from "working" back to "idle"; session was renamed to "Basic Math Question Session"

Verified the response mentions "4" and took screenshot — The agent's response displays the correct answer "4" clearly visible in the chat, as shown in the screenshot (page-2026-04-30T00-46-21-991Z.png)
